# AcousticMaterial.TotalAbsorptionTransitionSpeed property

Fade speed used when entering/exiting total-absorption occlusion. Lower values make soundproof transitions less abrupt.

```csharp
public float TotalAbsorptionTransitionSpeed { get; set; }
```
